title: acalypha gracilens
intro: Acalypha gracilens, also known as the slender acalypha or dwarf copperleaf, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which make it useful in treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Acalypha gracilens can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and it is also sometimes used in traditional medicine to make tonics and ointments.
